name: Pork Chop Supper
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge pork in flour.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet; brown chops on both sides.
3. Sprinkle with thyme, salt and pepper.
4. Peel potatoes and cut into 3/4 inches cubes; add to skillet along with the carrots and onion.
5. Pour broth over all; bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 40-50 minutes or until pork and vegetables are tender.
